name: Autobots
changelog: The safety trio: chain-is-truth reconcile (the bot verifies its position against the DeepBook MarginManager's real debt and drops stale phantoms), a data-integrity watchdog (entries pause on stale candles; the agent rotates across 3 public Sui fullnodes on read failures), and a dead-man switch (a crashed or hung agent auto-restarts and a running bot auto-resumes, reconciling with the chain first; repeated failures fire a native notification). Plus: DevTools disabled in the packaged app, Sharpe annualised for 24/7 markets, and an honest backtest-model disclosure.
